# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing architecture'

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    Description: Environment name for resource tagging

  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (default 4 days)

  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds (default 5 minutes)

  MaxReceiveCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 1000
    Description: Maximum number of receives before moving to DLQ

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      DelaySeconds: 0
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: !Ref MaxReceiveCount
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: Type
          Value: DeadLetterQueue
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  QueueEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SQS queue encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing

  QueueEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref QueueEncryptionKey

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-topic'
      DisplayName: Event Processing Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt TopicEncryptionKey.Arn
      Subscription:
        - Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
          Protocol: sqs
          RawMessageDelivery: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  TopicEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SNS topic encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow CloudWatch Events to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing

  TopicEncryptionKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-topic-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref TopicEncryptionKey

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'sqs:*'
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  TopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowPublishFromAccount
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'SNS:Publish'
              - 'SNS:Subscribe'
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 'SNS:*'
            Resource: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  ProcessorRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processor-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
                - ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SQSQueueAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
                  - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
                  - 'sqs:GetQueueAttributes'
                  - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'kms:Decrypt'
                  - 'kms:DescribeKey'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
        - PolicyName: SNSTopicPublish
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'sns:Publish'
                Resource:
                  - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'kms:Decrypt'
                  - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt TopicEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing

  PublisherRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-publisher-role'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
                - ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SNSPublishAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'sns:Publish'
                Resource:
                  - !Ref EventProcessingTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'kms:Decrypt'
                  - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt TopicEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: EventProcessing

  QueueDepthAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-queue-depth-alarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alert when queue depth exceeds threshold
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 1000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  DLQAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-dlq-messages-alarm'
      AlarmDescription: Alert when messages appear in DLQ
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.QueueName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueURL'

  QueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueARN'

  QueueName:
    Description: Name of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.QueueName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueName'

  DeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQueueURL'

  DeadLetterQueueARN:
    Description: ARN of the Dead Letter Queue
    Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQueueARN'

  TopicARN:
    Description: ARN of the SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref EventProcessingTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicARN'

  TopicName:
    Description: Name of the SNS Topic
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.TopicName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicName'

  ProcessorRoleARN:
    Description: ARN of the Event Processor IAM Role
    Value: !GetAtt ProcessorRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ProcessorRoleARN'

  PublisherRoleARN:
    Description: ARN of the Event Publisher IAM Role
    Value: !GetAtt PublisherRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublisherRoleARN'

  QueueEncryptionKeyARN:
    Description: ARN of the Queue Encryption Key
    Value: !GetAtt QueueEncryptionKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueKeyARN'

  TopicEncryptionKeyARN:
    Description: ARN of the Topic Encryption Key
    Value: !GetAtt TopicEncryptionKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicKeyARN'
